name: MONEY TREE PAWN SHOP
description_short: Money Tree Pawn Shop in Opa-Locka, FL offers collateral-based cash loans and merchandise sales with over 25 years of operation. They accept jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms, and other valuables.
description_long:
Money Tree Pawn Shop has operated in Opa-Locka, Florida for over 25 years, establishing itself as a neighborhood pawn operation focused on customer relationships and accessibility. The business functions as a traditional pawn shop, accepting valuable items as collateral for short-term cash loans and reselling merchandise to bargain buyers.

The shop accepts a wide range of collateral including gold and diamond jewelry, tools, electronics, musical instruments, firearms, and power equipment. For customers seeking loans, they advertise competitive interest rates on cash advances. For buyers, they offer merchandise purchases with flexible payment options including cash, debit, credit, and interest-free layaway arrangements. The business operates seven days a week with extended hours most weekdays (8:30 AM–7:00 PM).

Money Tree differentiates itself through emphasis on customer service and personal relationships, explicitly stating they "treat everyone like family" and "care about customers getting back their priceless merchandise." This suggests a philosophy prioritizing customer redemption of pawned items rather than aggressive inventory acquisition. The shop maintains accessibility features and positions itself as family-friendly.

Limited public data exists about this operation—only one review is visible on the listing (5 stars, praising employee "Sly" for friendly and quick service). The business lacks detailed transparency about specific loan terms, APR rates, redemption periods, or fee structures beyond the claim of "lowest interest rates." As with all pawn shops, this model involves temporary surrender of personal property, and actual terms should be verified directly.
pros: Over 25 years of operating history in the community
Wide range of accepted collateral including jewelry, electronics, firearms, and tools
Seven days a week operating schedule with extended weekday hours
Advertises competitive interest rates compared to other pawn lenders
Offers interest-free layaway for merchandise purchases
Accepts multiple payment methods (cash, debit, credit)
Staff receives positive reviews for friendly and efficient service
cons: No specific APR rates, fees, or loan terms disclosed on listing
Requires surrender of personal property as collateral, creating retrieval risk
Redemption period and default policies not publicly documented
Only one customer review available, limited track record visibility
No information about insurance coverage for pawned items
best_for: People needing immediate cash who own valuable items they're willing to temporarily pledge
Bargain hunters seeking discounted merchandise across jewelry, electronics, and tools
Buyers interested in interest-free payment plans through layaway
diagnosis: Money Tree Pawn Shop is suitable for individuals who own valuable items and need quick cash, or buyers seeking discounted merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal property, and specific terms (APR, redemption periods, fees) must be confirmed directly by phone at (305) 685-9663 rather than relying on promotional claims.
services: Cash loans against tools and power equipment
